question: Show each customer name and the total quantities of dishes ordered by that customer.
sql: SELECT customer.Name, SUM(customer_order.Quantity) FROM customer JOIN customer_order ON customer.Customer_ID = customer_order.Customer_ID GROUP BY customer.Customer_ID;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个客户的订单总数量

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求显示每个客户名称及其订购的菜品总数量，SQL反向翻译描述中通过SUM(customer_order.Quantity)和GROUP BY customer.Customer_ID实现了该意图，且未遗漏关键列或条件。
